title: Automated Code Review Comments
scenario: Write a code review comment for a piece of JavaScript code that includes suggestions for improvement, potential bugs, and code readability issues. The output should be a well-structured markdown comment with proper formatting.
constraints: Must include at least 3 suggestions for improvement.
Must use proper header formatting for each suggestion.
Must include a summary of the overall code quality.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the markdown is valid and properly formatted.
Verify that the output meets all specified constraints.
Check if the suggestions are relevant and accurate.
